findingDetails.title: Central env reference carries a stale generated-date marker while missing shipped goal-state env vars
findingDetails.claim: ENV_REFERENCE.md says it was generated from source analysis and last updated on 2026-06-10, but its goal-plugin env table omits state cleanup env vars shipped and documented on 2026-07-01.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Searched env examples, JSON/JSONC/YAML config and manifest surfaces, and skill markdown MK_GOAL_* mentions for another current generated env reference or inline mk-goal env table; none was found beyond the already-open ENV_REFERENCE and goal_plugin gaps.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The date may represent the last full generator run rather than hand edits, but the wording still tells readers the table came from source analysis and is stale relative to current source.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade or close if the marker is removed, regenerated, or explicitly scoped as historical/non-authoritative while the missing env rows are added.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update or regenerate the generated/last-updated marker as part of the P1-001 env-table fix.

traceabilityChecks.spec_code: pass: re-read mk-goal env definitions and output fields against docs
traceabilityChecks.playbook_capability: confirmed existing P2-002 with no severity change
traceabilityChecks.config_manifest: pass: opencode.json and JSON/JSONC/YAML searches found no inline mk-goal env docs
traceabilityChecks.changelog_coverage: partial: phase summaries disclose fields, packet changelog stops at phase 008

notes: All six prior open findings still hold on fresh reread. P2-002 has partial counterevidence in a generic post-mutation-state line, but not enough to close or downgrade it.

negativeResults: No JSON/JSONC/YAML/plugin manifest documents mk-goal env vars inline
No other central env table beyond ENV_REFERENCE.md and goal_plugin.md was found
Packet changelog entries stop at phase 008; phase implementation summaries provide stopgap disclosure for mutation, store_health, and state-retention vars
